title: LuwMonSMP
description: Luwmon SMP is a pixelmon focused and centered SMP where multiple creators stumble into the world of pokemon with lore, events, and friends to be made.
body:
Luwmon SMP is a pixelmon focused and centered SMP where multiple creators stumble into the world of pokemon with lore, events, and friends to be made.

The mod pack is made to reflect that very goal with many mods such as Pixelmon, zoom, voice chat, and more to create a fun content centered experience.
